description_long: This object is a marble grave monument set on a broad, rectangular base with a multi-tiered platform. The central feature is a tall, upright headstone with a rounded top, flanked by a smaller, dark-colored headstone to one side. A series of steps leads up to the main platform, which is bordered by a contrasting dark marble trim. The surfaces are smooth and polished, with the main structure and steps made from light gray marble, while the secondary elements and base are in a darker stone. The monument is solid and imposing, designed to serve as a prominent grave marker in a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A large, multi-tiered marble grave monument with a tall headstone, steps, and contrasting dark and light stone elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall central headstone, wide base, and smaller dark headstone to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the monument, the layered platforms, and the steps leading up to the main area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the steps, the back of the headstones, and the full width of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monument's thickness, the side profile of the steps, and the arrangement of the headstones.
